//: DS Platform dev-stand — Centrifugo v6 minimal dev config (PORTABLE CONTRACT).
//secrets: Values below are dev-only placeholders, NOT secrets. A recipe needing real keys overrides them via CENTRIFUGO_* env vars (setup-design §4).
//channel: 006 webinar-room chat (EARS-3). The `room` namespace backs the per-event chat channel `room:event:<id>`. Clients are subscribed SERVER-SIDE via the connection token's `channels` claim (the gate-scoped subscribe-only token the api mints), and CANNOT publish — `allow_publish_for_client` is pinned false EXPLICITLY (defense-in-depth on a security-critical namespace, not the implicit default): every post rides the server-side gated PostChatMessage command over the HTTP API. History is bounded and client-readable (`allow_history_for_client`) so a doctor joining mid-webinar hydrates the recent conversation on subscribe; only a client already subscribed to the channel (i.e. holding the gate-scoped token for THIS room) can read it. Retention (`history_ttl` 43200s = 12h) spans a full webinar + margin so a mid-webinar reload or resubscribe after a quiet stretch still hydrates the conversation, never an empty pane over a live room; `history_size` stays bounded at 100 (#1124).
